evals.prompt: I have a collection of design documents for our microservices platform. I want to build a knowledge base from them. Here are 3 source files in /Users/deepsky/Documents/projects/llm-wiki-skill/llm-wiki-workspace/test-sources/ — microservices-design.md, api-gateway-update.md, and incident-report.md. Please set up a wiki vault at /Users/deepsky/Documents/projects/llm-wiki-skill/test-vault and ingest all three documents. I want to be able to see how concepts connect across these docs.
evals.expected_output: A fully initialized Obsidian vault with wiki pages for key concepts (microservices, API gateway, service mesh, etc.), entities (teams, services, technologies), and source summaries. All pages should be cross-linked with [[wikilinks]]. index.md and log.md should be populated. .manifest.json should track all 3 sources.
expectations: Vault has raw/, wiki/, and outputs/ directories
.obsidian/app.json exists making it a valid Obsidian vault
All 3 source files are stored in raw/
.manifest.json exists and tracks all 3 ingested sources
At least 5 wiki pages exist for concepts/entities extracted from the sources
Wiki pages contain [[wikilinks]] cross-referencing other pages
index.md has categorized entries for the wiki pages
log.md contains at least one ingest operation entry with timestamp
All wiki pages have YAML frontmatter with required fields (tags, sources, status)

evals.prompt: The api-gateway-update.md source in my wiki has been updated — Phase 1 timeline moved from Q2 to Q3 2026, and there's a new risk: 'Envoy configuration complexity may require hiring a dedicated platform engineer ($200K/year)'. Please re-ingest this updated source and cascade the changes through the wiki. The wiki vault is at /Users/deepsky/Documents/projects/llm-wiki-skill/test-vault.
evals.expected_output: The wiki should detect the modified source, update the API Gateway / Envoy / Istio wiki pages with the new timeline and risk, update any pages that reference the migration timeline, update index.md summaries, and log the re-ingestion in log.md. The original content from other sources should be preserved.
expectations: The source file in raw/ reflects the updated Phase 1 timeline (Q3 2026 instead of Q2)
The source file in raw/ includes the new risk about platform engineer ($200K/year)
At least one wiki page about the API gateway migration reflects the updated Q3 timeline
.manifest.json is updated with a new hash or timestamp for the modified source
log.md has a new entry for the re-ingestion operation
An update summary file exists describing what changed

evals.prompt: I have a wiki at /Users/deepsky/Documents/projects/llm-wiki-skill/test-vault. Can you answer this question from the wiki: 'What are all the risks and open questions across our microservices platform, and which teams are responsible for addressing them?' Also run a lint check while you're at it.
evals.expected_output: A synthesized answer pulling from multiple wiki pages, citing specific pages with [[wikilinks]]. Should cover: open questions from the design doc, risks from the migration doc, action items from the incident report, with team assignments. The lint report should identify any issues (orphaned pages, missing cross-refs, etc.) and auto-fix what it can.
expectations: Query answer file exists and contains synthesized content
Query answer references multiple wiki pages using [[wikilinks]]
Query answer covers risks from at least 2 different source documents
Query answer mentions team assignments (Team Alpha, Beta, or Gamma)
Lint report file exists
Lint report identifies specific issues or explicitly confirms wiki health
